title: MappingEvidence

method.description: Algorithm or technique used to generate this evidence.

score.description: Confidence score in the range [0, 1] produced by the detection method.

notes.description: Optional human-readable notes explaining the evidence.

artifacts.description: List of artifact types that were examined (e.g., 'labels', 'profileStats').

description: A single piece of evidence supporting a field-to-field semantic mapping, capturing the detection algorithm, confidence score, descriptive notes, and supporting artifact references.
